name: default
description: Machine-readable PlanAuditReport emitted by the plan-verifier agent: a binary verdict, plan/spec paths, a gaps array (goal-coverage gaps, missing steps, ordering and reference problems, risk notes — each with kind/severity/message and optional task/spec refs), and requirement coverage counts. Placeholder strings keep the file parseable; the agent expands the gaps exemplar element, one per gap. Emit JSON even on PASS (gaps empty or suggestions only).

slots.description: Binary verdict; matches the markdown verdict.
Relative path to the spec, or null.
Gap kind. The gaps array (see shape) carries one exemplar element to clone per gap.
Task reference, e.g. 'Task N' or a task id.
Requirements mapped to at least one covering task.

shape.gaps[]: { kind: enum[missing-requirement,scope-creep,ambiguous-acceptance,unmapped-task,dependency-violation,broken-reference,hidden-intention,missing-edge-case], severity: enum[critical,important,suggestion], message: string, task_ref: string (optional), spec_ref: string (optional) }
